name: Agents
summary: Expose local agent discovery and execution through URI routes.
description: Agents is an if-uri urirun connector for expose local agent discovery and execution through URI routes. It is represented in the public catalog so the connector can be discovered, versioned and linked to its repository while implementation details are completed.
useCases: Discover Agents capabilities from the connector catalog.
Plan flows that use agents:// URI routes.
Install or track the connector from its GitHub repository.
